payload.label: basket
payload.long_description: Gray-brown woven rectangular storage basket with a folded light-gray fabric liner visible at the top; textured wicker-like weave with slight wear, front face largely visible but top edge is partially cropped — appears to be about 0.8 meters from the camera.
